_comment: Mock ERP clause library for ClauseFlow demo. Maps clause codes to their ERP records.

clauses.title: Contractor Code of Business Ethics and Conduct
clauses.text: This clause establishes requirements for contractor codes of business ethics and conduct, internal control systems, and disclosure of violations.

clauses.title: Contractor Employee Whistleblower Rights
clauses.text: Requires the contractor to inform employees of whistleblower rights and protections under 41 U.S.C. 4712.

clauses.title: Basic Safeguarding of Covered Contractor Information Systems
clauses.text: Requires basic safeguarding of contractor information systems that process, store, or transmit Federal contract information.

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Hardware, Software, and Services Developed or Provided by Kaspersky Lab
clauses.text: Prohibits contractors from using Kaspersky Lab products or services.

clauses.title: Prohibition on Contracting for Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
clauses.text: Prohibits the use of covered telecommunications equipment or services.

clauses.title: Utilization of Small Business Concerns
clauses.text: Requires maximum practicable utilization of small business concerns.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Segregated Facilities
clauses.text: Prohibits maintaining segregated facilities.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity
clauses.text: Implements Executive Order 11246, Equal Employment Opportunity.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Veterans
clauses.text: Implements requirements for equal opportunity for veterans.

clauses.title: Equal Opportunity for Workers with Disabilities
clauses.text: Implements requirements for equal opportunity for workers with disabilities.

clauses.title: Employment Reports on Veterans
clauses.text: Requires filing of VETS-4212 reports.

clauses.title: Combating Trafficking in Persons
clauses.text: Prohibits trafficking in persons and sets compliance requirements.

clauses.title: Drug-Free Workplace
clauses.text: Requires maintenance of a drug-free workplace.

clauses.title: Restrictions on Certain Foreign Purchases
clauses.text: Restricts acquisition of supplies or services from certain foreign countries.

clauses.title: Rights in Data—General
clauses.text: Defines rights in technical data and computer software developed under Government contracts.

clauses.title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.text: Requires flow-down of applicable clauses to subcontracts for commercial products.

clauses.title: Preference for Privately Owned U.S.-Flag Commercial Vessels
clauses.text: Requires preference for U.S.-flag commercial vessels in ocean transport.

clauses.title: Requirement to Inform Employees of Whistleblower Rights
clauses.text: Requires the contractor to inform employees of whistleblower rights per 10 U.S.C. 4701.

clauses.title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
clauses.text: Requires implementation of NIST SP 800-171 for safeguarding covered defense information and reporting cyber incidents within 72 hours.

clauses.title: Notice of Authorized Disclosure of Information for Litigation Support
clauses.text: Provides notice that contractor information may be disclosed for litigation support.

clauses.title: Prohibition on the Acquisition of Covered Defense Telecommunications Equipment or Services
clauses.text: Prohibits acquisition of covered defense telecommunications equipment or services from specified entities.

clauses.title: Item Unique Identification and Valuation
clauses.text: Requires unique item identification (IUID) marking for specified items.

clauses.title: Prohibition of Hexavalent Chromium
clauses.text: Prohibits use of hexavalent chromium unless approved.

clauses.title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
clauses.text: Implements Buy American Act requirements and balance of payments program.

clauses.title: Qualifying Country Sources as Subcontractors
clauses.text: Allows qualifying country sources as subcontractors under Buy American provisions.

clauses.title: Restriction on Acquisition of Certain Articles Containing Specialty Metals
clauses.text: Restricts acquisition of articles containing specialty metals not melted/produced in the U.S. or qualifying countries.

clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.text: Requires preference for certain domestic commodities including specialty metals.

clauses.title: Export-Controlled Items
clauses.text: Requires compliance with export control laws for items subject to ITAR or EAR.

clauses.title: Rights in Technical Data—Noncommercial Items
clauses.text: Defines Government rights in technical data for noncommercial items.

clauses.title: Technical Data—Commercial Products and Commercial Services
clauses.text: Defines Government rights in technical data for commercial products and services.

clauses.title: Validation of Restrictive Markings on Technical Data
clauses.text: Provides procedures for Government validation of restrictive markings on technical data.

clauses.title: Contractor Purchasing System Administration
clauses.text: Requires approved purchasing system for subcontract placement.

clauses.title: Contractor Counterfeit Electronic Part Detection and Avoidance System
clauses.text: Requires a counterfeit electronic part detection and avoidance system.

clauses.title: Sources of Electronic Parts
clauses.text: Requires procurement of electronic parts from authorized sources.

clauses.title: Transportation of Supplies by Sea
clauses.text: Requires use of U.S.-flag vessels for ocean transportation.

clauses._comment: Intentional mismatch for demo — ERP has DEC 2022 but Acme PO references DEC 2022 correctly. Stellar PO will show a mismatch.
clauses.title: Preference for Certain Domestic Commodities
clauses.text: Requires preference for certain domestic commodities including hand or measuring tools, stainless steel flatware, and specialty metals.

clauses.title: Quality Management Systems - Requirements for Aviation, Space and Defense Organizations
clauses.text: Quality management system standard for aviation, space, and defense organizations. Includes requirements for product safety, configuration management, and risk management.

clauses.title: Aerospace First Article Inspection Requirement
clauses.text: Standardizes first article inspection requirements including Forms 1, 2, and 3.

clauses.title: Acceptability of Electronic Wire Harnesses and Cable Assemblies
clauses.text: Prescribes requirements and acceptance criteria for cable, wire, and harness assemblies.

clauses.title: Crimping, Interconnecting Cables, Harnesses, and Wiring
clauses.text: Requirements for crimping of electrical connections in cables, harnesses, and wiring.

clauses.title: Quality Assurance Requirements for Suppliers
clauses.text: Stellar Dynamics Corporation quality assurance requirements for supplier quality management, documentation, inspection, and record retention.

clauses.title: Electrical Wiring and Harnessing Standards
clauses.text: Stellar Dynamics Corporation requirements for electrical wiring and harness manufacturing including testing, ESD protection, and wire marking.

clauses.title: Material and Process Requirements for Metallic Components
clauses.text: Requirements for material procurement, certification, heat treatment, special processing, and prohibited materials for metallic aerospace components.
